requirement_topic.en: E-Redes Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Portuguese Network
requirement_topic.zh: E-Redes并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz葡萄牙电网
requirement_topic.zht: E-Redes併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz葡萄牙電網

summary.en: Portugal's electricity distribution network is operated by E-Redes (formerly EDP Distribuição), with sector oversight by ERSE (Entidade Reguladora dos Serviços Energéticos) and transmission by REN (Redes Energéticas Nacionais). The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring E-Redes supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance (Protocolo de Ligação) before energisation. For publicly accessible chargers, ERSE oversees AFIR compliance and DGEG (Direção-Geral de Energia e Geologia) provides energy-sector oversight for larger installations.
summary.zh: 葡萄牙配电网由E-Redes（原EDP Distribuição）运营，ERSE（葡萄牙能源监管机构）负责行业监管，REN（葡萄牙能源网络）负责输电。低压电网环境为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成E-Redes供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收（Protocolo de Ligação）。对于公众可访问充电桩，ERSE监督AFIR合规情况，DGEG（葡萄牙能源和地质总局）对大型安装提供能源行业监管。
summary.zht: 葡萄牙配電網由E-Redes（原EDP Distribuição）運營，ERSE（葡萄牙能源監管機構）負責行業監管，REN（葡萄牙能源網絡）負責輸電。低壓電網環境為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成E-Redes供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能品質審查、調試及書面項目驗收（Protocolo de Ligação）。對於公眾可訪問充電樁，ERSE監督AFIR合規情況，DGEG（葡萄牙能源和地質總局）對大型安裝提供能源行業監管。

standards_or_laws: E-Redes — Manual de Ligações (electricity network connection and project acceptance)
ERSE — Entidade Reguladora dos Serviços Energéticos (energy sector oversight)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
DGEG — Direção-Geral de Energia e Geologia (energy and geology directorate-general)

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Portugal 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：葡萄牙230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：葡萄牙230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for E-Redes review. The E-Redes Protocolo de Ligação process requires site-specific documentation including ITED (Infraestruturas de Telecomunicações em Edifícios) and ITUR (Infraestruturas de Telecomunicações em Loteamentos, Urbanizações e Conjuntos de Edifícios) compliance where applicable. Portuguese-language technical documentation is required for E-Redes review.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按E-Redes审查准备。E-Redes Protocolo de Ligação流程要求提供场址专项文件，包括适用时的ITED和ITUR合规证明。E-Redes审查要求提供葡萄牙语技术文件。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按E-Redes審查準備。E-Redes Protocolo de Ligação流程要求提供場址專項文件，包括適用時的ITED和ITUR合規證明。E-Redes審查要求提供葡萄牙語技術文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require E-Redes project review and Protocolo de Ligação acceptance; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an E-Redes / Portugal approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Portugal 230/400 V

source.publisher: ERSE — Entidade Reguladora dos Serviços Energéticos (Portugal energy regulator)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Portugal-ready EVSE needs E-Redes project acceptance and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Portuguese-language technical documentation is required for E-Redes review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向葡萄牙的EVSE需要E-Redes项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。E-Redes审查要求提供葡萄牙语技术文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向葡萄牙的EVSE需要E-Redes項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。E-Redes審查要求提供葡萄牙語技術文件。
